spec_match.rationale: Covers the spec narratively but the concept page is largely prose — relevant headline capabilities of the Chrome 151 drops support for macOS 12; UA-CH platformVersion is the only programmatic signal. are explained but not exercised on this page.

interactive.rationale: Live interactive controls present and wired up — passes the no-static-card rule.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb on the feature index closely matches what the concept page delivers — title, lede, and interactive surface line up.

edge_cases.rationale: Happy path is well covered; edge cases / failure modes from the spec (see open questions) are not exercised on this concept page.

references.rationale: Cites the chromestatus.com/feature link in the see-also section as the design system requires.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables in use, no raw hex leakage, design-system tokens consistent with the rest of the showcase.

openQuestions.title: Hardware compat list is static — pull it from a data file
openQuestions.detail: If Apple ships a new macOS this autumn the list needs updating. Render the table from a JSON blob colocated with the page so a future routine can refresh it without touching markup.

summary: Hardware compatibility + admin guidance, narrative. Main gap: Hardware compat list is static — pull it from a data file.
